title: Prepared food public/private catalog with immutable nutrition versions
summary: 승인 artifact가 생기기 전 public row/result를 fail-closed 0건으로 유지하고, owner-only private manual 완제품을 검색하며 label 영양을 immutable version과 atomic current pointer로 생성·수정·soft-delete하는 backend-only catalog다.
goal: 현재 approved public promotion artifact 0건 경계를 지켜 importer/seed 없이 public rows/results를 0건으로 닫고, private manual catalog의 owner-only·결측 비제로 의미와 영양 변경 이력·old immutable version을 보존하는 backend 계약을 닫는다.

owners.claude: replaced only for the user-approved nutrition/products/planner program; the global stage-owner policy is unchanged
owners.codex: fresh role-separated Codex tasks own Stage 1 docs authoring, independent Stage 1.5 review and repair-final, Stage 2 backend TDD implementation, and independent exact-head Stage 3 review; no author or implementer self-approves

dependencies: ingredient-nutrition-conversion-model is merged and provides the shared approved nutrition source profile and value model
nutrition products planner contract is locked in official requirements v1.7.20 database v1.3.21 and API v1.2.25
independent fresh Codex Stage 1.5 approval is required before Stage 2 starts
